async fn handle_request(data: Vec<u8>) -> String {
    let parsed = parse_payload(&data).await;
    let validated = validate(parsed).await;
    serialize_response(validated).await
}

async fn parse_payload(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<String> {
    data.chunks(100).map(|c| String::from_utf8_lossy(c).to_string()).collect()
}

async fn validate(items: Vec<String>) -> Vec<String> {
    items
}

async fn serialize_response(items: Vec<String>) -> String {
    items.join(",")
}
